case_title: STEVEN BARWISE et al VS. SALVADOR SEGOVIA et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-28-2014 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00) SERVED MAR-21-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CADIZ, GLORIA AKA "DAISY" (BUILDING MANAGER)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,300.00 FILED BY BARWISE, STEVEN EVERETT, CHARITY AS TO DEFENDANT SEGOVIA, SALVADOR (OWNER/LANDLORD) CADIZ, GLORIA AKA "DAISY" (BUILDING MANAGER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

ORDER ON COURT FEE WAIVER (FW-002 REQUEST TO WAIVE ADDITIONAL COURT FEES( [X] JURY FEES AND EXPENSES, [X] FEE FOR LIVE VIDEO CONFERENCE) *THE COURT DENIES YOUR REQUEST BECAUSE THE INFORMATION YOU PROVIDED ON THE REQUEST SHOWS THAT YOU ARE NOT ELIGIBLE FOR THE FEE WAIVER YOU REQUESTED: CCP 116.320 DOES NOT COVER THIS FEE. AS TO BOTH PLAINTIFFS, BARWISE & EVERETT.
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CHARITY EVERETT BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-28-2014 AT 3:30 PM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARWISE, STEVEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SEGOVIA, SALVADOR (OWNER/LANDLORD) CADIZ, GLORIA AKA "DAISY" (BUILDING MANAGER) PLAINTIFF, CHARITY EVERTT'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE--NO APPEARANCE BY THIS PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER (FW-003) ON COURT FEE WAIVER *GRANTED FOR PLAINTIFFS, BARWISE, STEVEN AND EVERETT, CHARITY. AS TO FW-001 REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00) SERVED MAR-21-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SEGOVIA, SALVADOR (OWNER/LANDLORD)
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (FW-001) (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARWISE, STEVEN EVERETT, CHARITY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-28-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-28-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT EXCEPT PLAINTIFF CHARITY EVERETT WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY TAGALO. INTERPRETER--- RONAGEN MARTINEZ. NO COSTS, AWARDED BY COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
